title: NA-Non ULIP
word_text:
Do Women Need to Buy Separate Health Insurance? Find Out Why
Meta Description: Women are now bursting through the glass barrier and pursuing equality in all aspects of life. They, though, tend to disregard their health while juggling several duties in their home and professional life.
Keywords: financial planning for women, life insurance policy, life insurance for housewife, life insurance for women
________________________________________________________
Financial Planning for Women
Women succeed in a variety of positions in modern society. A daughter, mother, and life partner to a self-assured professional and entrepreneur, among other things. But, while attempting to strike a balance between their personal and professional lives, are they paying enough attention to themselves? Are they well-prepared for any unanticipated circumstances? The answer is no, not nearly as much as they should.
A family's backbone is made up of women. A woman's illness has far-reaching implications for the family's well-being. Women are more susceptible to heart disease, cancer, reproductive health issues, thyroid, diabetes, and hypertension, among other disorders. Furthermore, women suffer unique health issues such as pregnancy, cancer of the reproductive system like ovarian and cervical cancer, and breast cancer, among others. As a result, it's essential to pay attention to their healthcare requirements. Life insurance for women is a must-have. There are a number of issues that contribute to women's lack of knowledge about life insurance policy.
Lack of awareness: Women should be aware that insurance firms provide a variety of women-centric life insurance policies. Women's health care requirements are distinct. As a result, insurance firms have created a variety of unique women's life insurance policies to meet the needs of women's health care.
Longer life expectancy means a higher premium: Studies show that women live longer than males. Women need more health care services than males because they live longer and are more likely to develop chronic diseases. As a result, many insurance firms charge somewhat higher premiums for complete coverage for women.
Rely on others for financial choices: Despite the fact that they are working hard in their careers, most women still prefer to leave financial decisions to their fathers or husbands. As a result, the majority of women want to be covered by their husband's or father's life insurance policy.
Preoccupied with many tasks: Women are busy saving for significant life events, and some are completely self-sufficient in their financial planning. However, they are preoccupied with saving for significant life events like schooling, marriages, children, homes, and so on, without considering the future uncertainty surrounding women's health care.
Not prioritizing their health: The majority of them just avoid going to the doctor. In the event of a health problem, many women turn to home treatments. It is past time for women to recognise the true value of their life and the necessity for their own life insurance policy.
Benefits of Maternity Care
With the growing cost of healthcare, being a mother comes with a lot of medical bills. With the rise in pregnancy problems and concerns, every woman should focus on obtaining a life insurance policy. Various insurance firms provide women's life insurance policies that cover the cost of maternity care.
Taxation Benefits
Working women might consider purchasing a separate life insurance policy in order to qualify for tax breaks under Section 80D of the Income Tax Act of 1961.
Wrapping Up
To have a happy and fulfilling life, women must take care of themselves. Choosing one of the life insurance plans available at Bajaj Allianz Life depending on your needs is the key to getting the most out of your benefits!
Sources:
https://www.acko.com/articles/health-insurance/why-every-women-need-to-buy-separate-insurance/
